parsed.explanation: I fixed structural and XML-validity issues while preserving the original content as much as possible: (1) corrected mismatched closing tag <PRICE>...</PRIZE> to <PRIZE>...</PRIZE>; (2) escaped '&' as '&' in 'dogmat. rat. & experim.'; (3) escaped '&' as '&' in 'Francoise & Allemande'; (4) normalized corrupted character in 'Pa√ücions' to 'Paßions'; (5) normalized corrupted character in 'Hau√üc-Gebett-Buch' to 'Hauß-Gebett-Buch'; (6) replaced garbled symbol '√†' after one FORMAT with '†'; (7) same replacement for the remaining occurrences of that garbled symbol. No additional wrapper tags were needed because the XML fragment is now well-formed.
